author: electroluminescent
description: A configurable sidebar for note properties: arrangeable sections, rich value types, dice rolling, per-type layouts, and toggleable feature modules such as a D&D 5e character sheet. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: electroluminescent
manifest.description: A configurable properties sidebar with arrangeable sections, rich value types (sliders, colors, images, formulas, derived numbers), dice rolling, inline rolls and properties, per-type layouts, and optional modules like a D&D 5e sheet.
manifest.name: Extended Properties

name: Extended Properties
